title: Enjoy Fun Salsa Classes at Nieves Latin Dance Studio: 4 or Unlimited Salsa/Bachata Classes for 1 Month. Save Up to 60%

pricing_options.label: Unlimited Salsa/Bachata Classes for One Month

structured_fields.label: WHAT'S INCLUDED
value: Unlimited salsa and bachata classes for one month

highlights_html: Join fun Salsa or Bachata classes, perfect for all experience levels. Learn more, socialize, and enjoy expert instruction
highlights_text: Join fun Salsa or Bachata classes, perfect for all experience levels. Learn more, socialize, and enjoy expert instruction
about_deal_html:
Get ready to spice up your routine and move to the rhythm of Latin beats. Dive into the vibrant world of Salsa and Bachata at Nieves Latin Dance Studio, where every step brings you closer to mastering the dance floor! Can you feel the excitement building as you prepare to unleash your inner dancer?

What We Offer

  • Four Salsa/Bachata Classes

  • Unlimited Salsa/Bachata Classes for One Month

    • Customers can attend any of the studio's salsa or bachata dance classes
    • Must be 13 or older
    • View the Queen's class schedule
    • View the Brooklyn class schedule
    • View the Long Island class schedule
    • View the Manhattan class schedule



Why You Should Grab The Offer

With multiple convenient locations across New York City, there's always a Nieves Latin Dance Studio nearby. Their specialized focus on Salsa and Bachata ensures top-notch instruction from skilled teachers who make learning both effective and enjoyable. The engaging class environment helps keep students motivated while fostering social connections within the community-oriented atmosphere. Detailed schedules offer flexibility for those with busy lifestyles, making it easy to fit dance into your routine. Plus, their proximity to iconic landmarks like Yankee Stadium adds an extra layer of excitement to your dancing journey. With a stellar 4.8 rating on Groupon, Nieves Latin Dance Studio has earned a reputation for delivering top-notch instruction and unforgettable dance experiences, making it the go-to destination for anyone eager to master Salsa and Bachata.

review_quotes.text: Great instruction, learning and practicing lots of new moves
review_quotes.author: Clio

review_quotes.text: Great deal on unlimited classes in multiple studios across the city. Slightly crowded as it's a group lesson but value is incredible.
review_quotes.author: Ajit

review_quotes.text: Alot of fun learning Salsa. The format is great because you don't need to cone with a partner.
